action.description: Use regular clinical examination to monitor patients receiving neoadjuvant therapy.

action.description: Use mammography, ultrasound, or MRI that was most informative at baseline to confirm progression or support surgical planning.
action.title: Use the most informative baseline imaging modality when imaging is needed
